assessment_items.question_content:
**Art historians believe this mosaic is based on $\_\_\_\_\_\_$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **Art historians believe this mosaic may be based on an ancient Greek painting, and therefore may give us some idea of the achievement of those artists—since no ancient Greek painting survives.**
**The Hellenistic dynamism appears in Darius's chariot, which is turning away from the Greeks, even though his guards' spears are still turned toward's Alexander's army.**

choices.content: one of the most elaborately decorated mansions in Pompeii.
the home of a famous general in Pompeii.

assessment_items.question_content:
**The mosaic was buried under ash when Mount Vesuvius erupted in 79 C.E. and was preserved until the building was excavated.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **This is correct. This mosaic was buried under volcanic ash until it was excavated.**
